This family comprises a group of small to medium-sized, delicate ferns commonly known as air plants or filmy ferns. The genus Microtrichomanes is part of the Hymenophyllaceae family and contains about 10 species of ferns. These plants are typically epiphytic, meaning they grow on other plants or surfaces, and have fronds that are thin and lacy. Microtrichomanes armstrongii, like other members of its genus and family, is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
